rules: Import Clash Display via Fontshare CDN (https://api.fontshare.com/v2/css?f[]=clash-display@200,300,400,500,600,700&display=swap).
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + tracking-[0.2em] in JetBrains Mono.
Never center text by default; use left alignment for strong geometric structure.

layout_and_spacing.grid_system: Tactile Brutalism: Use pure HTML/Tailwind to create border-collapse style layouts with exposed grid lines (border-white/10).
layout_and_spacing.bento_grid: Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Sectors to create asymmetry and visual tension.
layout_and_spacing.spacing: Generous (p-8, p-12, p-16) inside containers. Heavy use of negative space to convey scale.
layout_and_spacing.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-sm (2px) to maintain raw geometric, structural architecture feel.

components.hero: Full screen cinematic motion. Image overlay gradient from-black/80 via-black/40 to-transparent. Typography as interface (viewport scaled oversized headline).
components.navbar: Glassmorphism 2.0 (backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60) with 1px delicate inner stroke (border-white/10). Must not be purely transparent.
components.buttons: Sharp edges, 1px solid border, high contrast. Primary CTA: bg-[#FF4500] text-white hover:bg-[#E03E00].
components.cards: Flat solid background (#141414), 1px subtle border (border-white/10), no soft shadows. Hover: border-[#FF4500] transition-colors.
components.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Implement 'Kinetic Texture' mode: massive outline text running in the background for Machinery/Engineering Capabilities section.
components.charts: Use Recharts (via Shadcn) for the Turnover Growth chart (2020-21 to 2024-25). Use high-contrast colors (#FF4500 for bars/lines), stark grid lines, no soft gradients.
components.forms: Customize Shadcn inputs: sharp corners (rounded-none), bg-[#141414], border-white/20, focus:border-[#FF4500].
components.case_studies: Build a deep-dive UX research/insights section showcasing elevated project analytics, blueprints, and data-driven results using stark grids and high contrast.

motion.scrolling: Install and use Lenis for smooth scrolling to give the site heavy, premium momentum.
motion.transitions: transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease. Avoid 'all'.
motion.interactions: Hover states on projects should feature fast, crisp transitions (e.g., Grayscale images switching to full color on hover, slight scale-up).

hero.description: Aerial view of a sprawling highway interchange, conveying monumental scale.

roads_highways.description: Aerial view of a highway intersection at night.

buildings.description: Architectural concrete monument with raw geometry.

irrigation.description: Massive gray concrete dam under blue sky.

leader.description: Portrait of Eng. Abhishek Kumar Gupta (Second-generation leader).

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT mention the name 'Abhilash Gupta' anywhere on the site.
The primary stakeholder and second-generation leader is Eng. Abhishek Kumar Gupta.
Company name is 'M/s Pramod Kumar Gupta Thekedar'.
Install and use '@phosphor-icons/react' for all icons to maintain a high-end structural look.
All interactive elements and key text MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button').
Avoid standard Vercel/Stripe card looks. Stick to pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing layouts to create overlapping and asymmetry.
Do not use generic dummy text; populate the 13 completed projects and 33+ machinery items with realistic-sounding infrastructure data based on the prompt.
Client section should list government entities like PWD, NH PWD, PMGSY, UP Bridge Corp using heavy typography if logos are unavailable.
